featured.title: 马斯克诉OpenAI「世纪诉讼」正式开庭
featured.titleEn: Musk's 'Lawsuit of the Century' Against OpenAI Begins
featured.summary: 马斯克指控OpenAI背弃非营利使命，提出五项诉求包括追缴全部不法获利、撤销营利化转型和解除阿尔特曼职务。若胜诉，OpenAI融资、合作网络将重构，近6万亿元AI产业链或受冲击。
featured.summaryEn: Musk accuses OpenAI of abandoning its non-profit mission. If he wins, OpenAI's funding and partnerships could be restructured, impacting the ~$840B AI industry.

featured.title: DeepSeek携手华为昇腾，推理成本暴降99%
featured.titleEn: DeepSeek + Huawei Ascent: Inference Cost Drops 99%
featured.summary: DeepSeek历时5个月完成与华为昇腾国产芯片的深度适配。华为CloudMatrix 384通过集群方式总性能反超英伟达NVL72达1.7倍，国产算力正从「能用」迈向「好用」。
featured.summaryEn: DeepSeek completed deep adaptation with Huawei Ascent chips. CloudMatrix 384 outperforms NVIDIA NVL72 by 1.7x via clustering.

items.title: 地平线发布「星空」芯片，迈入整车智能体时代
items.excerpt: 中国首款舱驾融合整车智能体芯片，完成从芯片到软件的整车计算平台全覆盖。
items.excerptEn: China's first cabin-drive integrated vehicle intelligence chip.

items.title: Meta大规模部署AWS Graviton处理器发力代理AI
items.titleEn: Meta Deploys AWS Graviton at Scale for Agentic AI
items.excerpt: Meta与亚马逊AWS签署合作协议，大规模部署Graviton处理器支持新一代AI系统。
items.excerptEn: Meta signs deal with AWS to deploy Graviton processors for next-gen AI systems.

items.title: 内蒙古启动「人工智能+制造」三年专项行动
items.excerpt: 围绕冶金、装备制造、煤化工等领域推进智能化改造。
items.excerptEn: Smart transformation in metallurgy, equipment manufacturing, coal chemical industry.

items.title: 深圳AI规上企业超2600家，核心产业营收2200亿元
items.excerpt: 累计发布5批近300个「城市+AI」应用场景清单。
items.excerptEn: Released ~300 city-level AI application scenarios across 5 batches.

items.title: 3D DRAM验证成功，AI内存将迎来革命
items.titleEn: 3D DRAM Validation Success: AI Memory Revolution
items.excerpt: NEO Semiconductor 3D X-DRAM技术完成概念验证，可利用现有3D NAND生产线。
items.excerptEn: NEO Semiconductor's 3D X-DRAM PoC validated, can use existing 3D NAND lines.

items.title: 联想牵手作业帮发布教育行业首款Claw AI一体机
items.titleEn: Lenovo & Zuoyebang Launch Claw AI一体机 for Education
items.excerpt: 出厂预装学情分析Skills，教师无需配置即可上手。
items.excerptEn: Pre-installed learning analytics skills, teachers can use out-of-the-box.

items.title: 中国AI专利量质齐升：占全球约60%
items.titleEn: China Holds ~60% of Global AI Patents
items.excerpt: 高价值发明专利229.2万件，其中七成属于战略性新兴产业。
items.excerptEn: 2.29M high-value invention patents, 70% in strategic emerging industries.

items.excerptEn: Token replaces Flops as new metric; human-AI interaction shifts to agent-agent.

articles.title: 马斯克诉OpenAI：一场改写规则的世纪诉讼
articles.titleEn: Musk vs OpenAI: A Lawsuit That Could Rewrite the Rules
articles.summary: 马斯克正式起诉OpenAI，指控其背弃非营利使命。表面上是要'夺回初心'——但如果告诉你，他最不想看到的结局恰恰是OpenAI真的变回非营利，这个故事就更有趣了。
articles.summaryEn: Musk formally sues OpenAI for abandoning its non-profit mission. On the surface, he wants to 'reclaim the original vision'—but what if his worst-case scenario is actually OpenAI going back to non-profit?

sections.title: 📌 事件摘要
sections.content: 马斯克要求五项救济：没收非法利润、撤销营利转换、罢免Altman等。OpenAI估值$860亿，微软投资$130亿，2000+生态伙伴牵扯其中。诉讼预计耗时2-3年。
sections.contentEn: Musk demands five remedies: disgorgement of profits, reversal of for-profit conversion, removal of Altman, etc. OpenAI valued at $86B, Microsoft invested $13B, 2000+ partners involved. Lawsuit expected to take 2-3 years.

sections.title: 🔍 深度分析：三个维度的表面与反直觉
sections.titleEn: 🔍 Deep Analysis: Surface vs Counter-Intuitive Across Three Dimensions

points.title: 法律层面：马斯克的真正目标不是
points.titleEn: Legal: Musk's Real Goal Isn't to 'Win'
points.surface: 【表面】马斯克的核心论据是OpenAI违背了初始承诺。若法院认定营利转换违法，OpenAI可能退回非营利。
points.surfaceEn: [Surface] Musk's core argument: OpenAI broke its initial non-profit promise. If the court rules the conversion illegal, OpenAI might revert to non-profit.
points.insight: 【反直觉】但马斯克聘用的律师团队有个微妙策略——他们要求
。这意味着马斯克可能不在乎OpenAI是否非营利，更在乎的是：如果法院认定营利转换
——微软可能被迫撤资，而马斯克可以用这笔钱为自己的xAI铺路。马斯克在用OpenAI的尸骸，给xAI争取18个月窗口期。
points.insightEn: [Counter-Intuitive] Musk's legal team demands 'disgorgement of illicit profits'—not just reversal. If the court rules the conversion 'illegal,' Microsoft's $13B becomes 'illicit gains'—Microsoft may be forced to divest, and Musk could use that capital to fund xAI. Musk is using OpenAI's carcass to pave the road for xAI's 18-month runway.

points.title: 商业影响：最慌乱的不是OpenAI，是Anthropic和Google
points.titleEn: Business Impact: The Most Panicked Aren't OpenAI—It's Anthropic and Google
points.surface: 【表面】若OpenAI被强制退回非营利，微软投资将面临无法退出困境，2000+生态伙伴需重新谈判。
points.surfaceEn: [Surface] If OpenAI reverts to non-profit, Microsoft faces trapped capital, 2000+ partners must renegotiate.
points.insight: 【反直觉】但真正会慌乱的是Anthropic和Google。为什么？如果法院裁定
，Anthropic（也是非营利转营利）和Google的AI伦理承诺也可能被审视。马斯克这一招，可能不是针对OpenAI，而是给整个AI行业设了一个法律陷阱。
points.insightEn: [Counter-Intuitive] The real panic will be at Anthropic and Google. Why? If the court rules that non-profit commitments are legally binding, Anthropic (also non-profit turned for-profit) and Google's AI ethics pledges could be scrutinized. Musk's move may not target OpenAI—it's a legal trap for the entire AI industry.

points.title: 行业意义：最支持马斯克的人，可能是OpenAI老员工
points.titleEn: Industry Significance: Musk's Biggest Supporters May Be OpenAI's Own Veterans
points.surface: 的路线之争。非营利胜则AI发展重回慢但安全轨道。
points.surfaceEn: [Surface] This is the 'idealism vs commercial interest' battle. Non-profit victory means slower but safer AI development.
points.insight: 【反直觉】OpenAI员工可能比马斯克更希望公司变回非营利。为什么？营利转换后员工股票期权暴涨——如果强制退回非营利，这些期权可能一文不值。但有意思的是，OpenAI一些早期员工（2015-2019年入职的）一直认为
。他们可能暗中支持马斯克，不是因为想要赔偿，而是想回到
的日子。最支持马斯克的人，可能不是你想的那些。
points.insightEn: [Counter-Intuitive] OpenAI employees may want the non-profit revert more than Musk. Why? Post-conversion stock options soared—but if forced back to non-profit, they become worthless. Yet interestingly, early employees (2015-2019 hires) have long felt the company 'lost its way.' They may quietly support Musk—not for compensation, but to return to 'doing research instead of raising money.' Musk's biggest supporters may not be who you'd expect.

pro.title: 正方：支持马斯克
points: 承诺就是承诺，不能拿了钱就翻脸
如果这次不追责，以后所有AI公司都会
非营利模式才能确保AI安全，不被资本绑架
pointsEn: A promise is a promise; you can't take the money and change your mind
If this goes unpunished, every AI company will use 'non-profit first, for-profit later' as a playbook
Only non-profit can ensure AI safety, free from capital capture

con.title: 反方：支持OpenAI
points: AI发展需要巨额资金，非营利模式养不起AGI
微软的投资拯救了OpenAI，不然它2019年就破产了
营利模式才能吸引顶尖人才，给出有竞争力的薪酬
pointsEn: AI development needs massive capital; non-profit can't fund AGI
Microsoft's investment saved OpenAI; it would have gone bankrupt in 2019
For-profit can attract top talent with competitive compensation

sections.title: 💡 AI前线观点
sections.content: 我们认为，这场诉讼最值得关注的结果不是
的判定。如果法院认定这种承诺具有约束力，整个AI行业的融资逻辑都会改变——投资人会更谨慎，创始人会更保守，AI创新的速度可能放缓，但方向可能更安全。如果法院认定不具约束力，那么
将成为标准打法——这对创新是利好，但也意味着公众对AI公司的信任会进一步下降。无论哪种结果，AI行业都将被重塑。
sections.contentEn: We believe the most consequential outcome isn't whether OpenAI reverts to non-profit, but the court's ruling on whether non-profit commitments are legally binding. If binding, AI financing logic changes—investors become cautious, founders conservative, innovation slows but steers safer. If non-binding, 'non-profit first, for-profit later' becomes standard—good for innovation, but public trust in AI companies erodes further. Either way, the AI industry will be reshaped.

sections.title: 🔮 反直觉预测
sections.content: 6个月后，如果这场诉讼还在进行中，最可能发生的不是法院判决，而是OpenAI主动提出一个
：成立一个独立的非营利基金会来监督AGI安全，同时保留营利实体负责商业化。这个方案会让马斯克的部分诉求得到满足，也让OpenAI避免彻底拆分的风险。
sections.contentEn: In 6 months, if the lawsuit is still ongoing, the most likely outcome isn't a court ruling—it's OpenAI proactively offering a 'compromise': establish an independent non-profit foundation to oversee AGI safety, while retaining the for-profit entity for commercialization. This satisfies some of Musk's demands while avoiding a complete split.
sections.note: 如果预测错了，我们就在这里承认——但至少这个想法值得讨论。
sections.noteEn: If this prediction is wrong, we'll admit it right here—but the idea is worth debating.

articles.sourceInfo: Source: Reuters, Bloomberg · 编辑审核：是 · 反直觉观点：3个
articles.sourceInfoEn: Source: Reuters, Bloomberg · Editor Reviewed: Yes · Counter-Intuitive Insights: 3
